items.rationale: Sees an emerging interplay between crypto and AI as a foundational frontier; backs efforts to decentralize AI and references a near-term 'real life' AI tutor (Primer).
items.age_note: Stated early (2023-04-05) but reinforced 2023-08-25 and 2023-12-10, so current.

citations.quote: We're in the early innings of some fascinating interplay between crypto+AI/ML
you, @harrygrieve and @benfielding will complement each other well as you work to decentralize AI
I don't think we're too far off from a real life version of A Young Lady's Illustrated Primer

items.rationale: Repeatedly flags ZK and SNARK performance breakthroughs (Lasso/Jolt) as major, builder-enabling advances; translates ZK milestones as 'big deals' for non-experts.

citations.quote: Get ready for some mind blowing improvements in SNARK performance with the release of Lasso & Jolt.
Translation for folks who aren't fluent in the world of ZK- this is a big, big deal.

items.rationale: Personally plays and praises on-chain games; led a seed round in the space and admires founders who 'see around corners.'

citations.quote: Playing @PirateNationNFT over the last few months has been a delight... @a16zcrypto is leading the @ProofOfPlay seed round!

items.rationale: Enthusiastic about L2 ecosystem scaling and omnichain/messaging infrastructure milestones.

citations.quote: THIS. IS. HUGE. Congrats to... the entire @LayerZero_Labs team.
Very, very excited to have the opportunity to work with @Fwiz again as he works to scale the @optimismFND ecosystem.

items.rationale: Deepening relationships with account-abstraction tooling builders after working with the founder during CSS.

citations.quote: Delighted that we're expanding and deepening our relationship with @pimlicoHQ!

items.rationale: Led sound.xyz Series A, energized by the 'keep shipping' founder ethos; continues backing creator-platform builders.

citations.quote: Hugely excited that @a16zcrypto is leading the @soundxyz_ Series A... his 'keep shipping' mantra is spot on.

items.rationale: Praised Filecoin FVM as advancing decentralized storage and compute capabilities.
items.age_note: Single statement on 2023-03-14, never restated; treat as persisted/aging.

citations.quote: a tremendous step forward in advancing the capabilities of decentralized storage and compute

items.rationale: Views getting decentralized governance right early as important and hard; promotes primers for founders.

citations.quote: For founders building in web3, getting decentralized governance right from the get go is important & hard.

items.rationale: Believes the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation; relocating CSS to London on that thesis.

citations.quote: we believe the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation.

items.rationale: Surfaces (without endorsing clarity) the need to parse SEC enforcement rulings; his pivot to the UK on regulatory grounds implies concern about the US environment.
items.age_note: Inferred from UK-vs-US framing (2023-09-19) and sharing SEC v Ripple analysis (2023-07-16); never stated as an explicit worry.

citations.quote: Trying to understand the nuances of this week's SEC v Ripple ruling?

risk_regime.rationale: Consistently bullish builder posture: joined a16z crypto, frequent 'LFG'/excitement on launches, frames crypto as analogous to the early-1990s internet he saw at Netscape. Energy and creativity of crypto founders described as 'infectious.' No bearish or capital-preservation language despite 2022-23 downturn context.

notes: Rosenthal is an operating partner, not an investor giving token calls — his corpus is ~80% generic management/leadership advice and personal (movies, food), so his market signal comes almost entirely from which portfolio launches and tech primitives he celebrates. He names companies/projects (Filecoin, sound.xyz, Proof of Play, Pimlico, Optimism, LayerZero, Matter Labs/zkSync, Gensyn, Yuga) rather than tradeable tokens, hence empty token arrays. Strongest and most-repeated conviction is ZK/SNARK infrastructure and crypto×AI. His most recent (Dec) signals — LayerZero, formless_xyz, planning/ecosystem-engagement advice — reinforce a forward-leaning, builder-optimist stance with no detectable reversals. Two notable non-crypto opinion pieces (academia mission drift, big-tech culture) reflect personal/societal views, not market posture, and were excluded from sector analysis.
